root_cause: Race condition between parallel DNS Enactors: one Enator classified anothers in-progress plan as stale and deleted it, publishing empty DNS record for dynamodb.us-east-1.amazonaws.com

timeline_events.event: DynamoDB API error rates spike; DNS record for regional endpoint is empty
Engineers confirm empty DNS record; DNS automation disabled
DynamoDB service recovers; thundering herd begins
Manual throttling breaks congestive collapse cycle

action_items: Implement safeguard preventing cleanup of actively-applied DNS plans
Add rate limiting for DWFM lease re-establishment after failover
